cost_sensitivity.cost_model: Future diagnostics must reject interpretation if any event-window readout only survives before fees, slippage, and spread assumptions.
cost_sensitivity.scope: Value-free migration metadata only; no execution cost estimate is produced.

cost_assumptions.scope: research planning only; no execution or tradability claim

data_assumptions.data_dependency_detail: FOMC scheduled meeting dates/times are publicly available and could be encoded as a small known-ahead calendar; FOMC SURPRISE magnitudes require an external economic-data feed. No event-calendar data source exists in the repo today (zero hits for fomc/cpi/nfp). Sourcing any external macro feed is deferred.
data_assumptions.missing_label_candidates: No new label candidates are declared by this legacy card.

exclusion_rules: Scheduled times use the existing point-in-time metadata pattern with the _require_metadata_known_as_of guard (metadata.available_ts <= row.available_ts). Surprise magnitude, if used at all, is an OFFLINE diagnostic conditioner / labels-only split and is excluded from any live feature contract.
Do not test needs_paid_data records in V0; paid-data sourcing is RED-deferred.
Do not edit or delete the legacy Track-A card until a later retirement phase is authorized.
expected_failure_modes: The conditioner is a known-ahead calendar position, not a price/quote-derived state; it is structurally distinct from the rejected price-action (regime, vwap_session) and BBO (bbo_tradability, liquidity_pa) main effects, which condition on realized price/quote dynamics. Expected-orthogonal by construction; the diagnostic, not this statement, decides.

Residualize forward outcomes against the dead-mechanism factors (regime/vwap_session/bbo_tradability/liquidity_pa) before scoring the event conditioner, and report the conditioner's marginal relationship on the residual.

FOMC scheduled meeting dates/times are publicly available and could be encoded as a small known-ahead calendar; FOMC SURPRISE magnitudes require an external economic-data feed. No event-calendar data source exists in the repo today (zero hits for fomc/cpi/nfp). Sourcing any external macro feed is deferred.
promotion_criteria: Any future WATCH or CANDIDATE routing requires reviewer-gated evidence and must preserve EXPLORATORY promotion guards.
Any future diagnostic must pass no-lookahead, duplicate-exposure, and testability checks before interpretation.

timestamp_assumptions.lookahead_description: Two distinct hazards: (1) the scheduled FOMC TIME must be carried as known-ahead metadata, not back-filled from realized volatility; (2) any FOMC SURPRISE magnitude (decision vs consensus, dot-plot deltas) is only knowable AFTER the release and must never become a live feature.
timestamp_assumptions.lookahead_level: high lookahead risk declared by the legacy Track-A card

hypothesis_card.author: ALPHA_IDEA_TO_VERDICT_LOOP_V0/IVL-P01
hypothesis_card.expected_mechanism: Conditional on a scheduled FOMC statement/press-conference window, intraday forward behavior over short horizons may differ systematically from non-event sessions; we test whether the pre-event-knowable proximity-to-scheduled-FOMC conditioner relates to forward outcomes. This is a falsifiable conditioning hypothesis, not a profitability claim.
falsification_criteria: Reject or requeue this migrated record if required governed features or labels are unavailable before diagnostics.
Block any later verdict if no-lookahead controls or duplicate exposure checks fail before a metric is inspected.
hypothesis_card.rationale: Scheduled monetary-policy information arrival concentrates positioning and hedging flow into a known window; behavior in that window is plausibly governed by a different process than ambient price action. Diagnostics decide whether any relationship exists.
risks: Two distinct hazards: (1) the scheduled FOMC TIME must be carried as known-ahead metadata, not back-filled from realized volatility; (2) any FOMC SURPRISE magnitude (decision vs consensus, dot-plot deltas) is only knowable AFTER the release and must never become a live feature.

The conditioner is a known-ahead calendar position, not a price/quote-derived state; it is structurally distinct from the rejected price-action (regime, vwap_session) and BBO (bbo_tradability, liquidity_pa) main effects, which condition on realized price/quote dynamics. Expected-orthogonal by construction; the diagnostic, not this statement, decides.

FOMC scheduled meeting dates/times are publicly available and could be encoded as a small known-ahead calendar; FOMC SURPRISE magnitudes require an external economic-data feed. No event-calendar data source exists in the repo today (zero hits for fomc/cpi/nfp). Sourcing any external macro feed is deferred.
hypothesis_card.title: Track-A migrated main-effect hypothesis: fomc_drift
